jobName: PL52687115x77mm DUOMAX 4000 B12+Se 1000mL Labels (1000) Sequential Numbering
lineDescription: 115x77mm DUOMAX 4000 B12+Se 1000mL Labels (1000) Sequential Numbering Size: 115mm x 77mm Material: PP60 - Permanent Print Colour: CMYK Tool: D0852(6,2)(6,2)1mm Rectangle Provided on 76mm Cores Finishing: TTV MACHINE APPLIED Qty: 1000 Supply: Sequential numbering to start from 0001 for each order of this Label ***ALWAYS INCLUDE SAMPLES ON OUTSIDE OF BOX*** ***Resellers Discount Applied*** For each roll - Numbering on the backing paper with consecutive sequence; the label closest to the core will be the lowest number ie: 1 Roll direction NUMBER 3, inner cone diameter is 76mm and an outer cone diameter is 81mm MOD 250mm
